DOWNFALL-ERUPTION.title: Eruption

DOWNFALL-BOWLING_BASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each enemy in combat.

DOWNFALL-CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo

DOWNFALL-CRUSH_JOINTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played this combat was a [gold]Skill[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

DOWNFALL-EMPTY_FIST.title: Empty Fist
DOWNFALL-INSIGHT.title: Insight
DOWNFALL-FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.title: Flurry of Blows
DOWNFALL-FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you change Stances, return this from the discard pile to your hand.
DOWNFALL-FLYING_SLEEVES.title: Flying Sleeves
DOWNFALL-FOLLOW_UP.title: Follow-Up
DOWNFALL-FOLLOW_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played was an Attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-JUST_LUCKY.title: Just Lucky
DOWNFALL-REACH_HEAVEN.title: Reach Heaven
DOWNFALL-REACH_HEAVEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Through Violence[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-THROUGH_VIOLENCE.title: Through Violence
DOWNFALL-SASH_WHIP.title: Sash Whip
DOWNFALL-SASH_WHIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played
this combat was an
Attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
DOWNFALL-THIRD_EYE.title: Third Eye
DOWNFALL-TRANQUILITY.title: Tranquility
DOWNFALL-WINDMILL_STRIKE.title: Windmill Strike
DOWNFALL-WINDMILL_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], increase its damage by {RetainIncrease:diff()} this combat.
DOWNFALL-EMPTY_BODY.title: Empty Body
DOWNFALL-EMPTY_MIND.title: Empty Mind
DOWNFALL-HALT.title: Halt
DOWNFALL-HALT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you are in [gold]Wrath[/gold],
gain {WrathBlock:diff()} additional
[gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-PRESSURE_POINTS.title: Pressure Points
DOWNFALL-PRESSURE_POINTS.description:
Apply {MarkPower:diff()} [gold]Mark[/gold].
ALL enemies lose Hp
equal to their [gold]Mark[/gold]
DOWNFALL-PROSTRATE.title: Prostrate
DOWNFALL-PROTECT.title: Protect
DOWNFALL-INNER_PEACE.title: Inner Peace
DOWNFALL-INNER_PEACE.description: If you are in [gold]Calm[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards, otherwise enter [gold]Calm[/gold]
DOWNFALL-RUSHDOWN.title: Rushdown
DOWNFALL-CARVE_REALITY.title: Carve Reality
DOWNFALL-CARVE_REALITY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALL-CONCLUDE.title: Conclude
DOWNFALL-CONCLUDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
End your turn.
DOWNFALL-DECEIVE_REALITY.title: Deceive Reality
DOWNFALL-DECEIVE_REALITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Safety[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALL-FEAR_NO_EVIL.title: Fear No Evil
DOWNFALL-FEAR_NO_EVIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FOREIGN_INFLUENCE.title: Foreign Influence
DOWNFALL-FOREIGN_INFLUENCE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 Attacks of any color to add to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show:
It costs 0 this turn|}
DOWNFALL-JUDGMENT.title: Judgment
DOWNFALL-JUDGMENT.description: If the enemy has {DamageThreshold:diff()} or lesss HP, set their HP to 0.
DOWNFALL-RAGNAROK.title: Ragnarok
DOWNFALL-RAGNAROK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
DOWNFALL-SIGNATURE_MOVE.title: Signature Move
DOWNFALL-SIGNATURE_MOVE.description:
Can only be played if this is the only Attack in your hand.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
DOWNFALL-SIMMERING_FURY.title: Simmering Fury
DOWNFALL-SIMMERING_FURY.description: At the start of your next turn, enter [gold]Wrath[/gold] and draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} cards.
DOWNFALL-TANTRUM.title: Tantrum
DOWNFALL-TANTRUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Enter [gold]Wrath[/gold].
Shuffle this card into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-WAVE_OF_THE_HAND.title: Wave of the Hand
DOWNFALL-WAVE_OF_THE_HAND.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, apply {WaveOfTheHandPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALL-WEAVE.title: Weave
DOWNFALL-WEAVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]Scry[/gold], return this from the discard pile to your Hand.
DOWNFALL-WHEEL_KICK.title: Wheel Kick
DOWNFALL-BATTLE_HYMN.title: Battle Hymn
DOWNFALL-BATTLE_HYMN.description: At the start of each turn, add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALL-SMITE.title: Smite
DOWNFALL-SAFETY.title: Safety
DOWNFALL-COLLECT.title: Collect
DOWNFALL-COLLECT.description:
Put a [gold]Miracle+[/gold] into
 your hand at the start
of your next {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} turns.
DOWNFALL-MIRACLE.title: Miracle
DOWNFALL-EVALUATE.title: Evaluate
DOWNFALL-EVALUATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-FASTING.title: Fasting
DOWNFALL-FASTING.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]
Gain 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
DOWNFALL-INDIGNATION.title: Indignation
DOWNFALL-INDIGNATION.description: If you are in [gold]Wrath[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies, otherwise enter [gold]Wrath[/gold].
DOWNFALL-LIKE_WATER.title: Like Water
DOWNFALL-LIKE_WATER.description: At the end of your turn, if you are in [gold]Calm[/gold], gain {LikeWaterPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-MEDITATE.title: Meditate
DOWNFALL-MEDITATE.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your discard pile into your hand and [gold]Retain[/gold] {Cards:plural:it|them}.
Enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
End your turn.
DOWNFALL-MENTAL_FORTRESS.title: Mental Fortress
DOWNFALL-NIRVANA.title: Nirvana
DOWNFALL-PERSEVERANCE.title: Perseverance
DOWNFALL-PERSEVERANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever this card is [gold]Retained[/gold], increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}
DOWNFALL-PRAY.title: Pray
DOWNFALL-PRAY.description:
Gain {MantraPower:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
Shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-SANCTITY.title: Sanctity
DOWNFALL-SANCTITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the last card played this combat was a Skill draw 2 cards
DOWNFALL-STUDY.title: Study
DOWNFALL-STUDY.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-SWIVEL.title: Swivel
DOWNFALL-SWIVEL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next Attack you play costs 0
DOWNFALL-TALK_TO_THE_HAND.title: Talk to the Hand
DOWNFALL-TALK_TO_THE_HAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you attack this enemy, gain {BlockReturnPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-WALLOP.title: Wallop
DOWNFALL-WALLOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
DOWNFALL-WORSHIP.title: Worship
DOWNFALL-DEVOTION.title: Devotion
DOWNFALL-DEVOTION.description: At the start of your turn, gain {DevotionPower:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FORESIGHT.title: Foresight
DOWNFALL-FORESIGHT.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Scry[/gold] {ForesightPower:diff()}.
DOWNFALL-BRILLIANCE.title: Brilliance
DOWNFALL-BRILLIANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Mantra[/gold] gained this combat.
DOWNFALL-LESSON_LEARNED.title: Lesson Learned
DOWNFALL-LESSON_LEARNED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your deck.
DOWNFALL-SANDS_OF_TIME.title: Sands of Time
DOWNFALL-SANDS_OF_TIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], lower its cost by 1 this combat.
DOWNFALL-SCRAWL_WATCHER.title: Scrawl
DOWNFALL-SCRAWL_WATCHER.description: Draw cards until you hand is full.
DOWNFALL-VAULT.title: Vault
DOWNFALL-VAULT.description:
Take an extra turn after this one.
End your turn.
DOWNFALL-BLASPHEMY.title: Blasphemy
DOWNFALL-CONJURE_BLADE.title: Conjure Blade
DOWNFALL-CONJURE_BLADE.description: Shuffle an [gold]Expunger[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:with X+1 |}into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-EXPUNGER.title: Expunger
DOWNFALL-DEUS_EX_MACHINA.title: Deus Ex Machina
DOWNFALL-DEUS_EX_MACHINA.description: When you draw this card, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Miracles[/gold] to your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
DOWNFALL-ESTABLISHMENT.title: Establishment
DOWNFALL-ESTABLISHMENT.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Retained[/gold], reduce its cost by 1 this combat.
DOWNFALL-OMNISCIENCE.title: Omniscience
DOWNFALL-OMNISCIENCE.description: Choose a card in your draw pile. Play the chosen card twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
DOWNFALL-OMNISCIENCE.selectionScreenProm: Select a card to play twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] i.
DOWNFALL-SPIRIT_SHIELD.title: Spirit Shield
DOWNFALL-SPIRIT_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your hand.
DOWNFALL-MASTER_REALITY.title: Master Reality
DOWNFALL-MASTER_REALITY.description: Whenever a card is created during combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
DOWNFALL-WREATH_OF_FLAME.title: Wreath of Flames
DOWNFALL-WREATH_OF_FLAME.description: Your next Attack deals {VigorPower:diff()} additional damage.
DOWNFALL-OMEGA.title: Omega
DOWNFALL-OMEGA.description: At the end of your turn, deal {OmegaPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALL-BETA.title: Beta
DOWNFALL-BETA.description: Shuffle an [gold]Omega[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-ALPHA.title: Alpha
DOWNFALL-ALPHA.description: Shuffle an [gold]Beta[/gold] into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-DEVA_FORM.title: Deva Form
DOWNFALL-DEVA_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and increase this gain by 1.
DOWNFALL-BECOME_ALMIGHTY.title: Become Almighty
DOWNFALL-FAME_AND_FORTUNE.title: Fame and Fortune
DOWNFALL-LIVE_FOREVER.title: Live Forever
DOWNFALL-WISH.title: Wish
DOWNFALL-WISH.description:
Choose one:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} Plated Armor,
{StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold], or {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
DOWNFALL-ANCIENT_CARD.title: Discipline
DOWNFALL-ANCIENT_CARD.description: If you end your turn with unused {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, draw that many additional cards next turn.
DOWNFALL-ANCIENT_CARD2.title: Combustion
DOWNFALL-FUNCTION_ATTACK_CARD.title: function()
DOWNFALL-FUNCTION_SKILL_CARD.title: function()
DOWNFALL-FUNCTION_POWER_CARD.title: function()
DOWNFALL-DEFEND_AUTOMATON.title: Defend
DOWNFALL-GOTO.title: Goto
DOWNFALL-REPLICATE.title: Replicate
DOWNFALL-REPLICATE.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold], add a copy to your discard pile.
DOWNFALL-STRIKE_AUTOMATON.title: Strike
DOWNFALL-BIT_SHIFT.title: Bit Shift
DOWNFALL-BIT_SHIFT.description: Choose an Encoded card to return to your hand. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold].
DOWNFALL-BRANCH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage or gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. The option not chosen is [gold]Encoded[/gold].
DOWNFALL-BRANCH.title: Branch
DOWNFALL-BRANCH_BLOCK.title: Branch: Block
DOWNFALL-BRANCH_ATTACK.title: Branch: Attack
DOWNFALL-BUG_BARRAGE.description: Gain 2 [gold]Wounds[/gold]. [gold]Cycle[/gold] each [gold]status[/gold], dealing {Damage:diff()} damage for each.
DOWNFALL-BUG_BARRAGE.title: Bug Barrage
DOWNFALL-BUGGY_MESS.title: Buggy Mess
DOWNFALL-CLEANSE.title: Cleanse
DOWNFALL-CLEANSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random [gold]Status[/gold] card in your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-CUT_THROUGH.title: Cut Through
DOWNFALL-DELAYED_GUARD.title: Delayed Guard
DOWNFALL-DEPRECATE.title: Deprecate
DOWNFALL-FINE_TUNING.title: Fine Tuning
DOWNFALL-FINE_TUNING.description: Increase all numbers of Encoded cards by 1 except cost.
DOWNFALL-FRONTLOAD.title: Frontload
DOWNFALL-INVALIDATE.title: Invalidate
DOWNFALL-OIL_SPILL.title: Oil Spill
DOWNFALL-OVERHEAT.title: Overheat
DOWNFALL-OVERHEAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove the next [gold]Compile Error[/gold] you would [gold]Encode[/gold].
DOWNFALL-PIERCING_SHOT.title: Piercing Shot
DOWNFALL-ROBO_CHOP.title: Robo-Chop
DOWNFALL-ROBO_CHOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} additional {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:plural:card|cards}.
DOWNFALL-SAFEGUARD.title: Safeguard
DOWNFALL-STICKY_SHIELD.title: Sticky Shield
DOWNFALL-TURBO.title: Turbo
DOWNFALL-TURBO.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into you discard pile.
DOWNFALL-WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
DOWNFALL-ALLOCATE.title: Allocate
DOWNFALL-ALLOCATE.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Status[/gold] in your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-BACKTRACE.title: Backtrace
DOWNFALL-BLOCKCHAIN.title: Blockchain
DOWNFALL-BOOST.title: Boost
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_ARMOR.title: Bronze Armor
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_ORB.title: Bronze Orb
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_ORB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Encode[/gold] a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold] in you draw pile.
DOWNFALL-CLASS_DEFAULT.title: Class Default
DOWNFALL-CLASS_DEFAULT.description: Next 2 times you create a Function, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of  current card in the first slot.
DOWNFALL-CLEAN_CODE.title: Clean Code
DOWNFALL-CLEAN_CODE.description: Remove the next 3 [gold]Compile Errors[/gold] you would [gold]Encode[/gold].
DOWNFALL-CONSTRUCTOR.title: Constructor
DOWNFALL-CONSTRUCTOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] as the first card, increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {ExtraBlock:diff()}.
DOWNFALL-COPY_PASTE.title: Copy Paste
DOWNFALL-COPY_PASTE.description: Play a copy of each Encoded card. They do not Encode.
DOWNFALL-DIGITAL_CARNAGE.title: Digital Carnage
DOWNFALL-FLAIL.title: Flail
DOWNFALL-FLAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to All enemies 2 times.
Gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FOLLOW_THROUGH.title: Follow Through
DOWNFALL-FOLLOW_THROUGH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last played card was a Function, play this again.
DOWNFALL-FOR_LOOP.title: For Loop
DOWNFALL-FOR_LOOP.description: The next card you [gold]Encode[/gold] causes {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} additional copies to also be [gold]Encoded[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FORCE_SHIELD.title: Force Shield
DOWNFALL-FORCE_SHIELD.description:
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Function created this combat.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FORTIFY.title: Fortify
DOWNFALL-FRAGMENT.title: Fragment
DOWNFALL-GET_LATEST.title: Get Latest
DOWNFALL-GET_LATEST.description: Gain a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold], it costs 0 until played
DOWNFALL-MINOR_BEAM.title: Minor Beam
DOWNFALL-INFINITE_BEAMS.title: Infinite Beams
DOWNFALL-INFINITE_BEAMS.description: At the start of each turn, gain a [gold]Minor Beam{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold].
DOWNFALL-MERGE_POWER.title: Minor Beam
DOWNFALL-MERGE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain X Minor Beams.
DOWNFALL-MERGE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} Minor {Amount:plural:Beam|Beams}.
DOWNFALL-INFINITE_LOOP.title: Infinite Loop
DOWNFALL-ITS_A_FEATURE.title: It's a Feature
DOWNFALL-ITS_A_FEATURE.description: Whenever you draw or Exhaust a Status card, gain {ItsAFeaturePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-ITERATE.title: Iterate
DOWNFALL-MAX_OUTPUT.title: Max Output
DOWNFALL-MAX_OUTPUT.description:
Draw 3 cards.
At the start of each turn, draw 1 additional card and [gold]Insert[/gold] 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold]
DOWNFALL-MERGE_CONFLICT.title: Merge Conflict
DOWNFALL-MERGE_CONFLICT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you [gold]Encode[/gold] a card, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of it.
DOWNFALL-NULL_POINTER.title: Null Pointer
DOWNFALL-OPTIMIZE.title: Optimize
DOWNFALL-OPTIMIZE.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] the next {OptimizePower:diff()} cards you [gold]Encode[/gold] that can be [gold]upgraded[/gold].
DOWNFALL-PHILOSOPHIZE.title: Philosophize
DOWNFALL-RECURSIVE_STRIKE.title: Recursive Strike
DOWNFALL-REFACTOR.title: Refactor
DOWNFALL-REFACTOR.description:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {Scry:diff()}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Status[/gold] cards discarded.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Status[/gold] card [gold]exhausted.[/gold]
DOWNFALL-REPAIR.title: Repair
DOWNFALL-REPULSOR.title: Repulsor
DOWNFALL-REPULSOR.description: When you draw the first [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold] card each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw a card.
DOWNFALL-RETURN.title: Return
DOWNFALL-RETURN.description:
Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
DOWNFALL-SEPARATOR.title: Separator
DOWNFALL-SEPARATOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] in the middle, increase its damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
DOWNFALL-TERMINATOR.title: Terminator
DOWNFALL-FULL_RELEASE.title: Full Release
DOWNFALL-FUNCTION_POWER.title: Full Release
DOWNFALL-UNDERVOLT.title: Undervolt
DOWNFALL-ASSEMBLY.title: Assembly
DOWNFALL-BREAK.title: Break
DOWNFALL-BURN_OUT.title: Burn Out
DOWNFALL-BURN_OUT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for ALL of your [gold]Status[/gold] cards, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them,
DOWNFALL-CULTIST_STRIKE.title: Cultist Strike
DOWNFALL-BYTE_SHIFT.title: Byte Shift
DOWNFALL-BYTE_SHIFT.description:
Return all Encoded cards to your hand.
They gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
DOWNFALL-BATCH.title: Batch
DOWNFALL-BATCH.description: Create a Function immediately out of the cards currently Encoded.
DOWNFALL-DEBUG.title: Debug
DOWNFALL-DEBUG.description: Remove all [gold]Compile Error[/gold] effects from Encoded cards.
DOWNFALL-DEV_TOOLS.title: Dev Tools
DOWNFALL-DECOMPILE.title: Decompile
DOWNFALL-DECOMPILE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Encoded cards.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
DOWNFALL-FIND_AND_REPLACE.title: Find and [gold]Replace[/gold]
DOWNFALL-FIND_AND_REPLACE.description:
[gold]Fetch[/gold] a card from you draw or discard pile.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] where it was.
DOWNFALL-FORMAT.title: Format
DOWNFALL-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.title: HYPER BEAM
DOWNFALL-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Put 5 [gold]Voids[/gold] on top of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-LIBRARY.title: Library
DOWNFALL-LIBRARY.description: At the start of your turn, gain a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold], it costs 0 until played.
DOWNFALL-MUTATOR.title: Mutator
DOWNFALL-MUTATOR.description:
Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] a [gold]Status[/gold] into a copy of this.
DOWNFALL-SENTIENT_FORM.title: Sentient Form
DOWNFALL-SENTIENT_FORM.description: Whenever you draw a Function, increase all numbers on it by 1 except for cost.
DOWNFALL-SHIP_IT.title: Ship It
DOWNFALL-SHIP_IT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Repeat for every [gold]Status[/gold] card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold].
DOWNFALL-SPAGHETTI_CODE.title: Spaghetti Code
DOWNFALL-SPAGHETTI_CODE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 random cards to [gold]Encode[/gold].
Repeat until you create a Function.
DOWNFALL-SUMMON_ORB.title: Summon Orb
DOWNFALL-SUMMON_ORB.description: Whenever you create or play a Function, gain {SummonOrbPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {SummonOrbPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
DOWNFALL-THUNDER_WAVE.title: Thunder Wave
DOWNFALL-THUNDER_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold].
DOWNFALL-VIRUS.title: Virus
DOWNFALL-VIRUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your hand and gain a [gold]Minor Beam[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+|} for each card discarded.
DOWNFALL-DEFEND_AWAKENED.title: Defend
DOWNFALL-STRIKE_AWAKENED.title: Strike
DOWNFALL-TALON_RAKE.title: Talon Rake
DOWNFALL-CEREMONY.title: Ceremony
DOWNFALL-HYMN.title: Hymn
DOWNFALL-HYMN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain a [gold]Ceremony[/gold].
Next turn, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-BURNING_STUDY.title: Burning Study
DOWNFALL-CRYOSTASIS.title: Cryostasis
DOWNFALL-DARKLEECH.title: Darkleech
DOWNFALL-E_S_P.title: ESP
DOWNFALL-THUNDERBOLT.title: Thunderbolt
